nodes.name: Stage 9 High-Risk Clarification and Refusal Reference Remediation
Stage 9 Versioned Dataset Regeneration and Reconciliation

edges.reason: Safety-reference edits overlap contradiction/completeness symbols and must consume the corrected contradiction semantics.
Risk-mechanism edits overlap cluster 016/024 generator inputs and must not reintroduce the contradiction rule.
The versioned manifest projection and revision-ledger shape must exist before final regeneration.
Systemic expected-reference sources must be corrected before generated rows are materialized.
Safety/reference sources must be corrected before generated rows are materialized.
Risk-reference sources must be corrected before generated rows are materialized.
Locale template sources must be corrected before generated rows are materialized.
The rich fixture revision must be present before the post-remediation package is generated.
The privacy review-reference version must be frozen before final reconciliation.
Full-corpus assessment is valid only over the reconciled post-remediation dataset and hashes.

consolidation.justification: Final adjudication leaves only the unsupported-contradiction component in S9-CORE-020-ES; the gender theory is rejected and final calibration has zero independent CLUSTER_LOCALIZATION roots. A separate cluster rewrite would duplicate the same generator rule and create contradictory ownership. The consolidated commit retains a locale-equivalence guard without broadening content scope.

deferred_future_release_candidate: Stage 9 Release Readiness and Runtime Boundary Decision
